finding_results.notes: The trainer now explicitly sees the raised ceiling on the incident card, the comparison note is stated as the difference between a live medical page and Petra's audit queue, and Thursday's bike-ceiling change is framed as a physician-locked-cap override that will surface in Petra's morning audit.
The repeated mountain-at-dusk formula was replaced with reflective-glass detail specific to Margot's comedown and self-erasure.
Post-session craving is now concentrated in the mirror/body-check passage and the closing dead-metal wrist beat. The earlier residual-current and forearm-memory re-proofs were removed.
Margot's feed interface and feed mark now consistently sit on her right wrist in this chapter.

summary: Revised chapter_04 to make the concealment workflow operationally legible, replace the repeated mountain image, compress redundant post-feed craving proofs, and restore right-wrist continuity without changing the chapter's ending state.
